The '''''Reaper''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] at the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The ''Reaper'' arrived after frigate [[Rapier (frigate)|''Rapier'']] was destroyed as [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transport]] group [[Renhoek (transports)|''Renhoek'']] picked up a supply of [[lonsigar]]s from a group of abandoned containers. The Reaper failed to destroy the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] ''[[Stimsenj'kat]]''.
